APPROVE
All token replacements specified in the bead description are present in the diff. The implementation cleanly swaps prior `accent-load/*` opacity-based styling for the requested surface/border/status tokens and adds a sensible root-vs-dependent node color distinction in D3Graph. No acceptance criteria were declared, so evaluation was against the description; nothing missing.
